# AnnealMusic

AnnealMusic is a generative ambient meditation sandbox. Coupled oscillators drift over a harmonic lattice, and you sculpt the field. It features physics-driven sound, session arcs, and audio-reactive visuals.

## Links

- [Homepage](https://anneal.averykarlin.org/)
- [Meditation Focus](https://anneal.averykarlin.org/listen)
- [Research Console](https://anneal.averykarlin.org/research.html)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/akarlin3/annealMusic)
